title: Al Khobar, Eastern Province — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Al Khobar is a city in Eastern Province with a population of 710,000. A major city in the Eastern Province, known for its corniche, shopping malls, and expatriate community.
